_doc: Path B (zero-spend SEO) post tracker. Per CLAUDE_GHP_CEO.md: 1 post/week max, kill criterion = 8 posts (~60 days) with $0 in revenue triggers Path C honest pivot. Track only revenue and one leading indicator (organic clicks). Verify ranking via free Google Search Console once site is verified there.
kill_criterion: 8 posts published with cumulative $0 affiliate revenue → Path C pivot

daily_snapshots.interpretation: Amazon clicks collapsed ~99% from April (~521) to May (6 in 5 days). IG 0-engagement streak has cut top-of-funnel traffic to a trickle. Yesterday's CTA reroute (Amazon search → Impact storefront) cannot be meaningfully tested at this volume. GSC has no data yet — verified <24h ago. Hold per CEO prompt; do not write post #8.

cadence_violation_2026-05-05: 7 posts published in 12 days violates CEO rule #1 (1 post/week max). All 7 target near-identical 'waterproof stretch sofa cover' keyword cluster — diminishing return per post. NEXT ACTION = stop posting, wait for GSC indexing + organic clicks, monitor Amazon Associates daily for first conversion. Do NOT publish week-2 post until at least 2026-05-12 AND only if first 7 have produced organic impressions.

next_post_planned.rationale: DuckDuckGo SERP check 2026-05-04: top 10 is small/mid affiliate sites (bestreviews #1, then catster/coveradvice/aypurr/etc.) — no Tier-1 media wall. Stretch jacquard genuinely fits the query. Hold until 2026-05-12 minimum to respect cadence and let existing 7 posts get crawled.

kill_criterion_status_2026-05-06: Autonomous flywheel published 8th near-duplicate COVER post (commit 17eb53e) without CEO authorization. Per CLAUDE_GHP_CEO.md: 8 posts × $0 revenue = Path C trigger. Decision deferred 7 days to allow GSC to actually report data — if zero impressions OR zero conversions by 2026-05-13, Path C is the honest call. Cron schedules on blog-writer/content-generator/reel-producer/daily-poster/repurpose disabled to prevent post #9, #10, etc. from racing past the decision.
